title: Opening for Production Engineer at Luminous Power Technologies

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Luminous Power Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Production Engineer looking for your next big career move? Luminous Power Technologies in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Luminous Power Technologies:
Luminous Power Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Luminous Power Technologies!
